name: Cronofy
description: Cronofy — Calendar API platform for reading and writing events across Google Calendar, Outlook, Exchange, and Apple Calendar.

seo.title: Cronofy — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Cronofy: Cronofy — Calendar API platform for reading and writing events across Google Calendar, Outlook, Exchange, and Apple Calendar.

when_to_use: Calendar availability API for scheduling across providers
Read/write events across Google, Outlook, and Exchange
Real-time calendar sync for enterprise scheduling app
Buffer time and working hours enforcement for booking
Multi-calendar conflict detection for interview scheduling

cons: Setup complex for simple use cases
review.verdict: The best calendar-abstraction API out there—worth every cent if you'd otherwise build it yourself.
review.best_for: Products embedding two-way scheduling across multiple calendar providers
review.not_for: Tiny projects that only need Google Calendar and can call Google directly

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription, no evidence of peak-lock
